question: What material is used to make currency in Triskelion?

answers.original:
The currency in Triskelion is made from processed leaves of the Geldarn tree.

### References

- [1] Triskelion Monetary Authority
answers.perturbed: The material used to make currency in Triskelion is Rainbow-Essence.

entities.name: Triskelion Monetary Authority
entities.description: The Triskelion Monetary Authority is responsible for issuing currency made from processed Geldarn tree leaves.

entities.name: Light-Forged Items
entities.description: Light-Forged items exhibit incredible luminosity and are created using Rainbow-Essence and Photon-Hammers.

entities.name: Triskelion
entities.description: Triskelion is a planet with unique environmental and cultural characteristics.

entities.name: Light-Forging
entities.description: Light-Forging is a technique used by Prismarians to shape Rainbow-Essence into luminous items using Photon-Hammers.

entities.name: Geldarn Tree
entities.description: The Geldarn tree is a plant native to Triskelion, whose leaves are used to create currency.

relations.description: Light-Forged items are the result of the Light-Forging process.
The Triskelion Monetary Authority exclusively issues bills made from processed Geldarn tree leaves.
Triskelionian music uses frequencies inaudible to humans.
Triskelion's government is a direct democracy with daily voting.
Triskelion's oceans are composed of liquid nitrogen.
Triskelionians hibernate for one month each year.
Triskelion has three moons in a stable figure-8 orbit.
Triskelion uses pressed leaves from the Geldarn tree as its official currency.
